settings.title: KiddyGuard®

settings.title: Who we are and what we do
settings.text: At Lascal®, we bring fun, freedom, and practicality to everyday parenting. As a proud Swedish family-owned company, we design innovative, high-quality products that make family outings smoother, stress-free, and more enjoyable. Our iconic Lascal BuggyBoard® - trusted by parents and loved by toddlers since 1997 - turns tired legs into happy rides. Whether it’s a quick stroll or a full day out, we help parents navigate life with ease while giving little ones a fun, secure way to ride along.

settings.question: Which Lascal BuggyBoard® is for me?
settings.answer:
We have a Lascal BuggyBoard® to suit everyone’s needs - the Mini, Maxi and Maxi Plus with the addition of an optional Saddle accessory with the Maxi Board.

The Maxi BuggyBoard® can be used with a Saddle that is available to purchase separately, this Saddle is different to the Maxi Plus Saddle that comes with the board at purchase.

settings.question: My pushchair hasn’t been tested with the BuggyBoard®?
settings.answer:
If your pushchair has not been tested, you may find another pushchair with a similar chassis has been tested with the BuggyBoard® and will fit in the same way, at www.buggyboard.info.

The brilliant thing about BuggyBoard® is that it can be fitted in many different ways and there is always a ‘best way’ for each and every buggy so that your child is comfortable and, wherever possible, you still use the parking brake and fold your buggy properly.

If your pushchair hasn’t been tested, our Customer Support Team can offer advice. Contact us here for more information.

settings.question: How do I remove the bolts on my BuggyBoard®?
settings.answer:
All Lascal BuggyBoard®’s will come with a Cotter Pin Key to remove the bolts. However, the Key can only remove bolt’s up to a certain tightness. If the Key does not work, we would advise either a 50p with a pair of pliers for leverage or WD40.

If the Bolt is damaged in the process of removing, please send us over an image and we can advise on the best next steps
for you.

settings.question: I have lost a part of my BuggyBoard®, where can I get a replacement?
settings.answer:
We have Lascal BuggyBoard® spares available over on our website. If you are unsure what part you need, view our website for more information.

Due to the nature of the board, vibrations can cause the Cotter Pins and Extender Bolts to loosen over time. To help limit the loss of parts on the BuggyBoard® and ensure the safety for your child, it is
recommended to check that all parts are tight and secure before every use.
